meta.description: Malformed QR corpus for EIP-4527 defensive parser testing

corpus.description: Valid UR truncated to 50% of its length — simulates a partial QR scan
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UR Checksum
  Error Code:            UR_PARSE_FAILED
  Reason:                UR string failed to parse: ur:eth-sign-request/taadaxonadgdadcnfeioldpysnwsadcnfeiol...
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Checksum failure indicates the payload was corrupted in transit.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and ask the sender to display a new QR code.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: UR truncated to a single character — no recoverable data remains
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UR Type Prefix
  Error Code:            UR_NOT_UR_FORMAT
  Reason:                Input does not start with "ur:": u
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Wrong UR type could route this payload to an unintended decoder.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: UR type prefix changed to 'btc-psbt' — wrong decoder would be invoked
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UR Type Prefix
  Error Code:            UR_WRONG_TYPE
  Reason:                Expected UR type "eth-sign-request", got "btc-psbt"
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Wrong UR type could route this payload to an unintended decoder.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: UR prefix stripped entirely — input looks like plain text, not a UR
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UR Type Prefix
  Error Code:            UR_NOT_UR_FORMAT
  Reason:                Input does not start with "ur:": eth-sign-request/taadaxonadgdadcnfeioldpysnwsadcnfeioldpy...
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Wrong UR type could route this payload to an unintended decoder.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: Invalid character '!' injected into bytewords body — not in bytewords alphabet
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UR Checksum
  Error Code:            UR_PARSE_FAILED
  Reason:                UR string failed to parse: ur:eth-sign-request/taadaxonad!dadcnfeioldpysnwsadcnfeiol...
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Checksum failure indicates the payload was corrupted in transit.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and ask the sender to display a new QR code.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: Last 8 characters of bytewords replaced to corrupt the CRC32 checksum
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UR Checksum
  Error Code:            UR_PARSE_FAILED
  Reason:                UR string failed to parse: ur:eth-sign-request/taadaxonadgdadcnfeioldpysnwsadcnfeiol...
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Checksum failure indicates the payload was corrupted in transit.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and ask the sender to display a new QR code.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: CBOR encodes an array instead of a map — field key lookup is impossible
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed CBOR Structure
  Error Code:            CBOR_NOT_A_MAP
  Reason:                CBOR decoded to an array, expected a map
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed CBOR may indicate corruption or an attempt to confuse the parser.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: CBOR map missing required key 2 (signData) — wallet would sign nothing
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed CBOR Structure
  Error Code:            CBOR_MISSING_SIGN_DATA
  Reason:                CBOR map is missing required field signData (key 2) or it is not bytes
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed CBOR may indicate corruption or an attempt to confuse the parser.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: signData field is CBOR null — null-dereference when wallet hashes it
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed CBOR Structure
  Error Code:            CBOR_MISSING_SIGN_DATA
  Reason:                CBOR map is missing required field signData (key 2) or it is not bytes
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed CBOR may indicate corruption or an attempt to confuse the parser.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: chainId = 0 is not a valid Ethereum chain — tx would be unroutable
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid Chain ID
  Error Code:            CBOR_INVALID_CHAIN_ID
  Reason:                chainId must be a positive integer, got: 0
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  An invalid chain ID would produce a transaction unroutable to any network.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: chainId = -1 is nonsensical — chainId is uint in the Ethereum spec
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid Chain ID
  Error Code:            CBOR_INVALID_CHAIN_ID
  Reason:                chainId must be a positive integer, got: -1
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  An invalid chain ID would produce a transaction unroutable to any network.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: CBOR map uses string keys ('2') instead of required integer keys (2)
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed CBOR Structure
  Error Code:            CBOR_MISSING_REQUEST_ID
  Reason:                CBOR map is missing required field requestId (key 1) or it is not bytes
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed CBOR may indicate corruption or an attempt to confuse the parser.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: CBOR bytes cut in half mid-stream — cannot complete decode
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed CBOR Structure
  Error Code:            CBOR_DECODE_FAILED
  Reason:                CBOR bytes failed to decode
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed CBOR may indicate corruption or an attempt to confuse the parser.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: Payload is random bytes that are not CBOR at all
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed CBOR Structure
  Error Code:            CBOR_DECODE_FAILED
  Reason:                CBOR bytes failed to decode
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed CBOR may indicate corruption or an attempt to confuse the parser.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: UR payload exceeds MAX_UR_CHARS=4096 — DoS via memory exhaustion
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Oversized Payload
  Error Code:            UR_TOO_LONG
  Reason:                UR string length 4532 exceeds limit of 4096 characters
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Oversized payloads may be an attempt to exhaust wallet memory.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload. Do not allocate memory for reconstruction. Request a new QR.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: EIP-712 JSON missing primaryType — struct hash is uncomputable
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed EIP-712 Typed Data
  Error Code:            TYPED_DATA_SCHEMA_INVALID
  Reason:                EIP-712 schema validation failed: Invalid input: expected string, received undefined
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed EIP-712 data cannot be safely hashed or displayed.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: EIP-712 domain is empty — no chainId or verifyingContract means trivial replay
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed EIP-712 Typed Data
  Error Code:            TYPED_DATA_SCHEMA_INVALID
  Reason:                EIP-712 schema validation failed: EIP-712 domain must contain at least chainId or verifyingContract
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed EIP-712 data cannot be safely hashed or displayed.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: EIP-712 domain has chainId=0 — hash is valid CBOR but semantically wrong
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed EIP-712 Typed Data
  Error Code:            TYPED_DATA_SCHEMA_INVALID
  Reason:                EIP-712 schema validation failed: Too small: expected number to be >=1
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed EIP-712 data cannot be safely hashed or displayed.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: EIP-712 types is empty — no type definition means primaryType has no struct hash
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed EIP-712 Typed Data
  Error Code:            TYPED_DATA_PRIMARY_TYPE_MISSING
  Reason:                primaryType "SafeTx" is not defined in types — struct hash cannot be computed
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed EIP-712 data cannot be safely hashed or displayed.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: Safe EIP-712 domain includes name/version — changes domain separator, breaking on-chain verification
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed EIP-712 Typed Data
  Error Code:            TYPED_DATA_SAFE_DOMAIN_EXTRA_FIELDS
  Reason:                Safe domain must not include "name" or "version" — these fields change the domain separator
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Malformed EIP-712 data cannot be safely hashed or displayed.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: signData (data-type:2) contains invalid UTF-8 byte sequences — cannot decode to JSON
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Invalid UTF-8 Encoding
  Error Code:            TYPED_DATA_INVALID_UTF8
  Reason:                signData bytes are not valid UTF-8 — cannot decode as EIP-712 JSON
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Invalid byte sequences in typed data prevent safe display to the signer.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: Fragment claims to be '5 of 3' — seqNum exceeds seqLen, implausible index
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Corrupted Fragment Ordering
  Error Code:            FRAGMENT_INDEX_OUT_OF_RANGE
  Reason:                Fragment seqNum 5 exceeds seqLen 3 — implausible fragment index
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Fragment sequence corruption prevents safe payload reconstruction.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────

corpus.description: Fragment seqNum is 0 — fountain codes are 1-indexed
corpus.humanReadable:
─── QR Payload Validation Failed ─────────────────
  Error Type:            Malformed QR Chunk Metadata
  Error Code:            FRAGMENT_ZERO_SEQ_NUM
  Reason:                Fragment seqNum is 0 — fountain codes are 1-indexed
  ─── Security Notice ────────────────────────────
  Invalid chunk metadata may confuse fragment reconstruction.
  ─── Recommended Action ─────────────────────────
  Reject payload and request a new QR code from a trusted source.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────
